steps.title: Read the coefficients
steps.content: In $80S+90C=1{,}120$, $80S$ represents the points from square tokens, so each square token is worth $80$ points. Similarly, $90C$ shows each circle token is worth $90$ points.

steps.title: Find the difference
steps.content: A circle token is worth $90-80=10$ more points than a square token.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The difference is $10$, which matches choice D.
